text:
Type Code (Fifth Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the fifth of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of the 
12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_TYPE_CD_05_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_06 
 WVR_TYPE_CD_05_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_05_11
